subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! This is a handmaid who hath turned toward the sanctuary of Thy mercy and directed herself to the threshold of Thy holiness. I beseech Thee by Thy grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذه امة اقبلت الی جوار رحمتک و توجهت الی عتبه قدسک اسئلک بفضلک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @soul; spirit after death
